title: EpicTrade
description: EpicTrade — A simple yet powerful Minecraft trading system that lets players securely exchange items with clickable requests and an intuitive interface. Perfect for survival and economy servers!
body:
### 🌟 EpicTrade – Safe & Smart Player Trading System
🔁 The Most Stylish and Secure Way to Trade in Minecraft!

EpicTrade brings a modern trading experience to your server — with smooth animations, clickable messages, and a beautiful GUI-based trading menu.
No more drop scams or confusion — just fair, fun, and flawless trading!

### ✨ Features That Make It Epic

💬 Clickable Chat Messages

Instantly accept a trade with one click — no typing needed!

🔒 Fully Safe Trading System

Both players confirm before any items are swapped.

🕒 Automatic Request Expiration

Trade requests expire after a few seconds to prevent spam.

🛡 Anti-Spam Protection

Players can’t send multiple requests to the same person.

👥 Live Trade GUI

Both players can see their items and confirm when ready.

💔 Smart Trade Cancellation

Personalized messages when either player cancels.

🎁 Item Summary on Completion

Shows exactly what you received after a successful trade.

🧩 Lightweight & Lag-Free

Runs smoothly even on large servers — built for performance.

### ⚙️ How It Works

Send a Request:
Type /trade <player> to invite someone to trade.

Accept the Trade:
The other player will get a clickable message like

💬 “Click here to accept the trade!”

Trade Safely:
Place your items in the GUI. Both players must confirm before items swap.

Cancel Anytime:
Close the window to cancel.

You’ll see “§cYou cancelled the trade!”

The other player sees “§c<player> cancelled the trade!”

Automatic Timeout:
If not accepted in 20 seconds, the request expires automatically.

### 💬 Commands
Command	Description

```
/trade <player>	Sends or accepts a trade request
```
### 🧾 Permissions
Permission	Default	Description
epictrade.use	✅ True	Allows a player to use the /trade command
### 🌈 Why Choose EpicTrade?

Beautiful GUI with clear, color-coded messages

Zero lag, zero confusion, zero scams

Perfect for Survival, Economy, or SMP servers

Polished experience your players will love

🧠 Upcoming Features

💰 Coin & Balance Trading System (Vault Support)

📜 Trade Logs / History System

🧱 Configurable GUI & Message Customization
